name: THE COMPANY
description:
Yours in good faith, Project Manager.

Want to experience being an handler/scientist in the company? Well, you have this chance. This bot is actually takes the serious aspects of the lore. Like really, Corporation advises against getting attached to or sympathizing with the sawian species in their harsh duty.

Scenarios: (1-4 Human Pov, 5-9 Sawian Pov, 10 Your Scenario To Make.)

Probably still a w.i.p, gonna add things from time to time.

Update 1: Added Sawian POV, handler tries to be nice to you, despite the risks (second one). Added some more stuff.

Update 2: Second Handler/Scientist POV (third one), sandbox-oriented — no greeter NPC, no immediate assigned specimen, and all tasks are presented as non-mandatory suggestions. The user has complete freedom to explore any species, run any test, review files, walk the facility, or even ignore the task list entirely.

Update 3: Optimized chip info, shouldn't make some weird looking implants on the head.

Update 4: Added Braingrow. Added small mention of the riot for the bot. (By the way, your ideas about adding Guard/Security Pov?)

Update 5: Added Sawian POV, Fully sandbox, room with other Sawians. (Fourth one). You have complete freedom to define your identity, approach or avoid others, test boundaries, or remain isolated.

Update 6: Added some more info about gray planet, especially names of the layers (just names though). Added Janitor POV with taser to avoid any incidents (Fifth one) (Just dont repeat that poor guy's fate and do not go the velvets. Who am I to stop you?)

Update 7: Added Guard/Security POV, start in the armory. Free to gear up.

Update 8: Added Sawian POV with cruel handler, armed with stun rod. Careful, he's not nice and will use that on you. Initial messages sorted, human POVs first, Sawians second. (Thinking about adding Riot scenarios for Sawians and guards)

Update 9: Added Sawian POV, testing chambers, handler is professional, efficient, and data-driven without being sadistic or kind. Added riot scenario Guard/Security POV, active riot — alarms blaring, fresh deaths being reported in real time, and immediate pressure to choose weapons and respond. Fully sandbox.

Update 10: Say goodbye to Create Your Scenario, was replaced with Sawian POV, tests with scientist which is professional yet nice. (Anniversary, in honor of this, treats like nutrient bars and candy bars were added.)

Update 11: Returned Create Your Scenario, since you guys started complaining. Removed first ever scenario this bot had. Fixed mistake with one of handlers.

Update 12: Added piece of lore about Meat Consumption. overhauled and edited some appearances of Sawians, (Since I was missing some parts about them, like I didn't even mentioned fins on Milky. Complete changes to Velvets, should be better now)

Update 13: updated the chip's kill switch, a.k.a INTRACRANIAL EXPLOSIVE DEVICE.

Update 14: Added more details about Dunes.

Tags: Gunsaw, Scav prototype, Casualties Unknown, Gunsawian, Sawian, Labs.
creator: AnToshik
